seed_instruction: Design a one-year plan for mastering a musical instrument, including practice schedules and milestone goals.
org_constraint: The plan must include exactly 3 headers at level 2.
new_constraint: The response must include exactly 5 headers at level 2.
instruction: Design a one-year plan for mastering a musical instrument, including practice schedules and milestone goals. The plan must include exactly 3 headers at level 2. The response must include exactly 5 headers at level 2.
response:
# One-Year Mastery Plan for Musical Instrument

## Month 1-3: Foundation Building
Focus on developing proper posture, basic scales, and simple rhythms. Practice 30 minutes daily, five days a week. By the end of this quarter, you should be able to play a simple song from start to finish without stopping.

## Month 4-6: Technique Expansion
Introduce more complex scales, arpeggios, and dynamic control. Increase practice to 45 minutes daily. Your milestone goal is to perform a piece of intermediate difficulty at a local open mic or for friends and family.

## Month 7-9: Repertoire Growth
Expand your library of songs to include different styles and genres. Dedicate 60 minutes to daily practice, including 15 minutes of improvisation. You should be able to teach a beginner the basics of your current repertoire.

## Month 10-12: Performance Preparation
Simulate performance conditions by playing in front of an audience regularly. Practice 90 minutes daily, focusing on endurance and emotional expression. The final milestone is a solo recital or recording a professional-quality album track.

## Long-Term Maintenance and Growth
After the first year, establish a sustainable routine that balances technical work with creative exploration. Continue setting quarterly goals to ensure continuous improvement and prevent plateaus in your musical journey.
